summary: Validated stopped-ship preview-route PH_MOVE rendering/forwarding updates and prompt-copy changes with passing tactical suite.

acceptance_criteria.description: Stopped ship in PH_MOVE highlights all legal preview routes.
Route rendering remains coherent after preview commitment.
Move prompt text reflects preview-route interaction and removes legacy adjacent-hex wording.
Nonzero-speed route rendering behavior remains unchanged.
FBattleScreen API additions are additive forwarding accessors for renderer needs.
